O

onBindViewHolder(InvitationAdapter.InvitationViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.InvitationAdapter
stitches invitation data to the view holder at the specified position
onBindViewHolder(NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapter
fills a notification row with the current notification data
onBindViewHolder(UserSearchAdapter.UserSearchViewHolder, int) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserSearchAdapter
fills a row in the list with a user search result
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.InvitationAdapter
creates a new InvitationViewHolder
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapter
creates the ViewHolder for a notification row
onCreateViewHolder(ViewGroup, int) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserSearchAdapter
creates the ViewHolder for a user search row
onDownvoteClicked(CommentItem) - Method in interface com.example.eventlotterysystem.CommentAdapter.CommentActionListener
Called when the user taps the downvote control on a comment.
onNotificationClick(NotificationItem) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminNotificationsLogActivity
This is the controller that is run when a notification is clicked by the User it runs a method that gives the user a popup of notification and its contents
onNotificationClick(NotificationItem) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyThingsActivity
This is the controller that is run when a notification is clicked by the User it runs a method that gives the user a popup of notification content depending on type of notification
onNotificationClick(NotificationItem) - Method in interface com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener
Triggered when a notification is clicked.
onNotificationLongClick(NotificationItem) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminNotificationsLogActivity
This is the controller that is run when a notification is long clicked by the User (no different from regular click it runs a method that gives the user a popup of the notification
onNotificationLongClick(NotificationItem) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyThingsActivity
This is the controller that is run when a notification click-held by the User creates a popup that allows the user to delete the notification
onNotificationLongClick(NotificationItem) - Method in interface com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener
Triggered when a notification is long-clicked.
onReplyClicked(CommentItem) - Method in interface com.example.eventlotterysystem.CommentAdapter.CommentActionListener
Called when the user taps Reply on a comment.
onUpvoteClicked(CommentItem) - Method in interface com.example.eventlotterysystem.CommentAdapter.CommentActionListener
Called when the user taps the upvote control on a comment.
onUserAdd(UserProfile) - Method in interface com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserSearchAdapter.OnUserAddListener
Triggered when add button is clicked for a user
openedByAuthorTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivityTest
tests to see that when opened through the organiser view allow navigation to edit the Event
optedOutUserDoesNotReceiveSuppressedNotificationsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationPreferenceIntegrationTest
verifies that a user who opts out does not receive winning, general, private, or coorganizer notifications
